dialogue.speaker: garcello
text: *COUGH* Heh... Looks like you beat me. You're not half bad at this!

dialogue.speaker: pico
text: Jeez, you look like shit now.. I swear you were fine like.. a minute ago...

dialogue.speaker: garcello
text: Well, as safe as a cigarette can be I guess. Not like i can *COUGH* get off of em-

dialogue.speaker: garcello
text: Well, anyways. You earned these. Have fun with em'

dialogue.speaker: pico
text: Actually.... Maybe one more match? Plus, i got a pack of my own, snagged these from a locker when I was little..

dialogue.speaker: pico
text: Hell yeah it is! And they're totally good for you! My buddies call it a medicinal herb, It's awesome.

dialogue.speaker: pico
text: Yeeeeeeahh.. THIS is the shit, man

dialogue.speaker: nene
text: Hey! I said I wanted one too, asshole!

dialogue.speaker: pico
text: Nah... We're doin' double or nothing! I get TWO packs if i beat you this time!

dialogue.speaker: garcello
text: (Two..? I can't even get this one pack off my hands... how the hell am i gonna get two?)

dialogue.speaker: garcello
text: (You know what... I'll go along with it, he's high)

dialogue.speaker: garcello
text: Sounds cool to me... *COUGH* I..I've been having fun atleast

dialogue.speaker: garcello
text: Maybe just one more of these to get my nerves straight...
